title: Amtech S0620 750mm (30") Bungee cords (2 pack)
features: UP TO 50% EXTENSION: This pack of two 750mm (30"), heavy duty, 12mm diameter bungee cords can extend up to 50% and are perfect for tarpaulins, cars, trucks, trailers, bikes, boats and motorcycles
NON-SCRATCH HOOKS: The cords have strong metal hooks with rubber stops to prevent scratching
EASY TO HANDLE: Ergonomic build supports fatigue-free use
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: Product Description Am-Tech 2-piece heavy duty bungee cord. Complete with hardened metal hooks and rubber stops. Poly bag and header card. Ideal for use on most vehicles. Measures 12mm diameter by 750mm (30-inch).Am Tech provides a 12 Month guarantee on all their products. Am Tech only use the best materials in their products to provide a product that meets your expectations Safety Warning No Box Contains 2x Bungee See more
